positive: A stylized celestial map design featuring interconnected constellations, lunar cycles, and nebulae, rendered in a modern linocut woodblock print style. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, with clean, bold silhouettes against a deep indigo and cosmic midnight background. Incorporate geometric astro-elements like stylized crescent moons, orbital paths, and abstract star clusters, using limited but contrasting colors: gold metallic accents, electric teal, and deep royal purple. The overall aesthetic should be ethereal, mystical, and graphically strong, perfect for high-quality screen printing on apparel. Intricate linework, high contrast, deep focus, vector quality.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, out of focus, messy, watercolor, gradient wash, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, grunge, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs
